title: Stargate Crosshair
description: Get the Stargate Earth Symbol as your Minecraft crosshair
body:
![StargateCrosshair](https://i.imgur.com/7KHU6M6.png)

Do you like Stargate? Well, this ResourcePack will change Minecraft default crosshair and replace it with Earht Point of Origin (ᐰ). It's a non invasive yet cool addition to your game. 

### Installation

Use Modrinth App for a one click installation or follow the steps:

- Download the fille.
- Drop it inside your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable the Quark-less Glint inside your game.
- Enjoy!

### It's me, hi

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).

And if you like to add more gold, follow me here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Danymaddox) and take a look, there's more comming soon.

![BisectHostingBanner](https://i.imgur.com/a5blp93.png)
